metadata.falPrompt:
13th century Florence, Piazza della Signoria, street level view. 
Open civic square, stone pavement, Palazzo della Signoria tower 
in background. Small crowds of medieval Italian citizens, guards, 
merchants. Late afternoon light, long shadows across stone. 
Tense, political atmosphere. Hand-painted illustration style, 
aged fresco texture, muted Tuscan palette — burnt sienna, 
weathered stone, tarnished gold, shadow blue. Serious, solemn, 
melancholic. No fantasy elements, no modern details.
